ai.summary: Detailed workflow for uploading, reviewing, and approving research documents (SCI-ACE) within an institute, covering submission, peer review, council meeti
ai.whatItShows: This flowchart illustrates the comprehensive process for submitting, reviewing, and approving research documents (SCI-ACE) within a scientific institute. It details stages from initial document upload by researchers, through secretary checks, chairman assignments, council member evaluations, and final approval or rejection. It also covers post-approval research execution, including change requests and periodic reporting.
ai.whenToUse: Use this diagram when documenting or standardizing a multi-stage document submission and approval process, particularly in research, academic, or compliance-heavy environments. It's ideal for onboarding new staff, auditing existing procedures, or identifying bottlenecks in an approval workflow.
ai.howToAdapt: This workflow can be adapted for any formal document submission and approval process by modifying the specific document types, roles involved (e.g., grant applications, project proposals, internal reports), and the number of review stages or decision points. Adjust timeframes and notification methods to fit organizational needs.
